Component.Name: CoNumEdit
Component.Caption: C(CoNumStatic)
Component.ComboListSource: STDMC SLCos.RMALineItemsOrdersSp( V(lsm1_CoNumEdit) PROPERTIES(CoNum, CustNum, Stat) DISPLAY(1,2,3))

Component.Name: CoNumGridCol
Component.ComboListSource: STDMC SLCos.RMALineItemsOrdersSp( V(lsm1_CoNumGridCol) PROPERTIES(CoNum, CustNum, Stat) DISPLAY(1,2,3))

EventHandler.Name: CoLineChanged
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLRmaitems.CalcUnitCreditSp( PARMS(VAR P(RmaNum), VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(CoRelease), VAR P(Item), VAR P(UM), VAR P(QtyToReturnConv), VAR P(Pricecode), VAR P(CustItem), RVAR P(UnitCreditConv), MESSAGE, RVAR V(IncludeTaxInPrice)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ConvertQuantities
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLUMConvs.GetumcfSp( PARMS(VAR P(UM), VAR P(Item), VAR P(RmahdrCustNum), VAR C, RVAR V(ConvFactor), MESSAGE, VAR) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ConvertQuantities
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLUMConvs.UomConvQtySp( PARMS(VAR P(QtyToReturnConv), VAR V(ConvFactor), VAR To Base, RVAR P(QtyToReturn), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: DataChangeCommCode
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCommodities.GetSupplQtyConvFactorSp( PARMS(VAR P(CommCode), RVAR V(vSupplQtyFactor), RVAR P(ComSupplQtyReq), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: DefaultECCode
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoitems.GetEcvtSp( PARMS(VAR P(RmahdrCustNum), VAR V(vCustSeq), VAR V(vShipCode), RVAR P(EcCode), RVAR P(Transport), RVAR P(ComSupplQtyReq), RVAR P(SupplQtyConvFactor)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: DisplayRMAWarningMsgSp
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLRmaitems.DisplayRMAWarningMsgSp( PARMS(VAR P(RmaNum), VAR P(CoNum), VAR V(IncludeTaxInPrice), VAR P(QtyToReturnConv), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: DisplayWarningMsgRmaRepl
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLRmaitems.IncludeTaxInfoSP( PARMS(VAR P(RmaNum), VAR P(RmaLine), VAR P(ReplCoNum), VAR P(RmahdrCustNum), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: GenerateOrderFromRepl
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLRmaitems.PreRmaReplSp( PARMS(VAR P(RmaNum), VAR P(RmaLine), RVAR V(CoCreditHoldMsg), RVAR V(CheckCreditMsg), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: GenerateOrderFromRepl
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLRmaitems.RmaReplSp( PARMS(VAR P(RmaNum), VAR P(RmaLine), RVAR V(ReplCoNum), RVAR V(ReplCoLine), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) IGNOREFAILURE() )

EventHandler.Name: GetNonInvItemInfo
EventHandler.Response: SLCoitems.GetNonInvItemInfoSp( PARMS(VAR P(Item), RVAR P(Description), RVAR P(UM), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR P(CommCode), RVAR P(Origin), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR P(UnitWeight), RVAR, RVAR , MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: InventoryItemValidate
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLItems.ObsSlowSp( PARMS(VAR P(ReplItem), VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR 1, MESSAGE, RVAR V(ItemObsSlowPrompt), RVAR V(ItemObsSlowPromptButtons), VAR V(Parm_Site)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ItemDataChange
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLRmaitems.RmaItemChangeItemSp( PARMS(VAR C(RmaNumEdit), VAR C(LineNumEdit), VAR C(CoNumEdit), VAR C(CoLineEdit), VAR C(ReleaseEdit), VAR P(RmahdrCustNum), VAR P(Item), RVAR C(CustItemEdit), RVAR C(DescriptionEdit), RVAR C(UMEdit), RVAR C(SerialTrackedHidden), RVAR C(OriginEdit), RVAR C(CommCodeEdit), RVAR C(UnitWeightEdit), RVAR P(TaxCode1), RVAR P(TaxCode1Desc), RVAR P(TaxCode2), RVAR P(TaxCode2Desc), MESSAGE, RVAR P(ComSupplQtyReq), RVAR P(SupplQtyConvFactor)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage)

EventHandler.Name: ItemDataChange
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLRmaitems.CalcUnitCreditSp( PARMS(VAR P(RmaNum), VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(CoRelease), VAR P(Item), VAR P(UM), VAR P(QtyToReturnConv), VAR P(Pricecode), VAR P(CustItem), RVAR P(UnitCreditConv), MESSAGE, RVAR V(IncludeTaxInPrice)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ItemDataChange
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLRmaitems.DisplayRMAWarningMsgSp( PARMS(VAR P(RmaNum), VAR P(CoNum), VAR V(IncludeTaxInPrice), VAR P(QtyToReturnConv), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ItemDataChange
EventHandler.Response: SLRmaitems.GetItemInfoSp( PARMS(VAR P(Item), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR V(ItemExists), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR V(MessageVar), MESSAGE, RVAR, RVAR P(ItemLotTracked), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR V(IsOpenNonInvItemForm)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: OrderNumLoseFocus
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCos.VerifyCoCustNumSp( PARMS(VAR C(CoNumEdit), RVAR V(CoCustNum), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: PromptForPriceUpdate
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLRmaitems.RmaLineItemsCalcUnitCreditSp( PARMS(VAR C(RmaNumEdit), VAR C(CoNumEdit), VAR C(CoLineEdit), VAR C(ReleaseEdit), VAR C(ItemEdit), VAR C(UMEdit), VAR C(QtyToReturnConvEdit), VAR C(PriceCodEdit), RVAR C(UnitCreditEdit), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: QtyToReturnChange
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLRmaitems.CalcUnitCreditSp( PARMS(VAR P(RmaNum), VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(CoRelease), VAR P(Item), VAR P(UM), VAR P(QtyToReturnConv), VAR P(Pricecode), VAR P(CustItem), RVAR P(UnitCreditConv), MESSAGE, RVAR V(IncludeTaxInPrice)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: QtyToReturnChange
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLRmaitems.DisplayRMAWarningMsgSp( PARMS(VAR P(RmaNum), VAR P(CoNum), VAR V(IncludeTaxInPrice), VAR P(QtyToReturnConv), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ReplCoLineChanged
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLRmaitems.RmaItemChangeCoitemSp( PARMS(VAR C(ReplCoNumEdit), VAR C(ReplCoLineEdit), VAR C(), RVAR C(ReplItemEdit), RVAR C(ReplItemDescEdit), RVAR C(ReplCustItemEdit), RVAR C(ReplUMEdit), RVAR C(), RVAR C(), RVAR C(), RVAR C(), MESSAGE, VAR C(), VAR C()) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ReplItemCoLine
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLRmarepls.RmaReplCoLineSp( PARMS(VAR C(RmaNumEdit), VAR C(LineNumEdit), VAR C(ReplCoNumEdit), VAR C(ReplCoLineEdit), VAR C(ReplItemEdit), RVAR C(ReplUnitPriceConvEdit), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ReplItemCoNum
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLRmarepls.RmaReplCoNumSp( PARMS(VAR C(RmaNumEdit), RVAR C(ReplCoNumEdit), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ReplItemDataChgDefaultLoad
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLRmarepls.RmaReplLoadDefaultsSp( PARMS(VAR P(RmaNum), VAR C(LineNumEdit), VAR C(ReplCoNumEdit), VAR C(ReplCoLineEdit), VAR 0, RVAR C(ReplItemEdit), VAR C(ReplQtyConvEdit), VAR C(ReplPricecodeEdit), RVAR C(ReplCustItemEdit), RVAR C(ReplItemDescEdit), RVAR C(ReplUMEdit), RVAR C(ReplUnitPriceConvEdit), RVAR C(ReplitmSerialTrackedHidden), RVAR P(RepIncludeTaxInPrice), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ReplItemRePrice
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLRmarepls.RmaReplLoadDefaultsSp( PARMS(VAR C(RmaNumEdit), VAR C(LineNumEdit), VAR C(ReplCoNumEdit), VAR C(ReplCoLineEdit), VAR 0, VAR C(ReplItemEdit), VAR C(ReplQtyConvEdit), VAR C(ReplPricecodeEdit), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR , RVAR C(ReplUnitPriceConvEdit), RVAR, RVAR , MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ReplItemUM
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLRmarepls.RmaReplUMSp( PARMS(VAR V(ReplItemUMOld), VAR C(ReplUMEdit), VAR C(ReplItemEdit), VAR C(CustNumEdit), RVAR C(ReplQtyConvEdit), RVAR C(ReplUnitPriceConvEdit), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: RmaItemChangeCoitem
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLRmaitems.RmaItemChangeCoitemSp( PARMS(VAR C(CoNumEdit), VAR C(CoLineEdit), VAR C(ReleaseEdit), RVAR C(ItemEdit), RVAR C(DescriptionEdit), RVAR C(CustItemEdit), RVAR C(UMEdit), RVAR C(UnitCreditEdit), RVAR C(TaxCode1Edit), RVAR C(TaxCode2Edit), RVAR C(UbCoiQtyInvoicedEdit), MESSAGE, VAR C(RmaNumEdit), VAR C(LineNumEdit)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: RmaItemChangeCoitemQty
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLRmaitems.RmaItemChangeCoitemSp( PARMS(VAR C(CoNumEdit), VAR C(CoLineEdit), VAR C(ReleaseEdit), RVAR , RVAR , RVAR , RVAR , RVAR , RVAR , RVAR , RVAR C(UbCoiQtyInvoicedEdit), MESSAGE, VAR P(RmaNum), VAR P(RmaLine)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: RmaNumChanged
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLRmaitems.RmaLineItemRmaLoadSp( PARMS(VAR C(RmaNumEdit), RVAR C(RmaDateEdit), RVAR C(StatEdit), RVAR C(CustNumEdit), RVAR C(CurrCodeEdit), RVAR C(NameEdit), RVAR P(CurrAmtFormat), RVAR P(CurrCstPrcFormat), RVAR P(TransNat), RVAR P(TransNatDesc), RVAR P(TransNat2), RVAR P(TransNat2Description), RVAR P(Delterm), RVAR P(DeltermDescription), RVAR P(ProcessInd), RVAR P(Pricecode), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: SSSRMXVerifyQty
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace Mongoose.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_SSSRMXVerifyQty_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() Dim strMsg As String
If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.CurrentItem("EnableRmaDispositions").GetValueOfInteger(0) = 1 Then ReturnValue = "0" Else
EventHandler.Response2:
ReturnValue = ThisForm.CallGlobalScript("RmaLineVerifyReceived", "", "", "", "", _ "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "") End If
If ReturnValue <> "0" Then strMsg = Application.GetStringValue("m%1IsNotEqualTo%2") strMsg = Replace(strMsg, "%1", Application.GetStringValue("sQtyReceived")) strMsg = Replace(strMsg, "%2", Applicat
EventHandler.Response3:
ion.GetStringValue("sQtyCredited"))
ThisForm.Variables("GenerateEventWithMessage").SetValue(strMsg) Else ThisForm.Variables("GenerateEventWithMessage").SetValue(" ") End If
End Sub End Class End Namespace )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLParms.GetSystemParm( PARMS(RVAR V(Parm_EcReporting), VAR ec_reporting) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLEmployees.CanAnySp( PARMS(VAR RMA Hide Costs, VAR, RVAR V(RMAHideCostsFlag)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLFormAdoption.LoadBannerStatus( PARMS(VAR V(CurrentFormName), RVAR V(DisableBanner), RVAR V(EndOfSupport), RVAR V(NewFormName), RVAR V(ToastStatus)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormSaveCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLRmaitems.IncludeTaxInfoSP( PARMS(VAR P(RmaNum), VAR P(RmaLine), VAR P(ReplCoNum), VAR P(RmahdrCustNum), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectNewCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLRmaitems.RmaLineItemRmaLoadSp( PARMS(VAR C(RmaNumEdit), RVAR C(RmaDateEdit), RVAR C(StatEdit), RVAR C(CustNumEdit), RVAR C(CurrCodeEdit), RVAR C(NameEdit), RVAR P(CurrAmtFormat), RVAR P(CurrCstPrcFormat), RVAR P(TransNat), RVAR P(TransNatDesc), RVAR P(TransNat2), RVAR P(TransNat2Description), RVAR P(Delterm), RVAR P(DeltermDescription), RVAR P(ProcessInd), RVAR P(Pricecode), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SLRmaDisps.SSSRMXGetQtyDispSp( PARMS(VAR P(RmaNum), VAR P(RmaLine), RVAR V(RmxQtyDisp), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Description: Loops through Subcollection cache and updates modified flag based on value of Status field.

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SLFormExtMsgEntities.FormatJSONVar( PARMS(VAR RMALineItems, VAR V(JSONVarNotInterpret), RVAR V(JSONVarWithLIT)) )forItemMaster,P(Item),,,P(ReplItemDesc),,,,InforCustomerPartyMaster,P(RmahdrCustNum),,,P(DerCus0Name),,,,) COLID(object)

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SLCurrencyCodes.GetCurrDecimalPlacesSp( PARMS(VAR P(Cus0CurrCode), RVAR V(CurrCodePlaces), MESSAGE) COLID(object) )

EventHandler.Name: TranslateCurrency
EventHandler.Response: RMALineItemsDomesticCurrency( LINKBY(RmaNum=RmaNum,RmaLine=RmaLine) SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(CustAdrCurrCode=P(Cus0CurrCode), Item=P(Item), RmaLine=P(RmaLine), RmaNum=P(RmaNum), RmahdrRmaDate=P(RmahdrRmaDate), RmahdrStat=P(RmahdrStat), RmahdrCustNum=P(RmahdrCustNum), UnitCreditConv=P(UnitCreditConv), AmtExtCredit=P(AmtExtCredit), RestockFeeAmt=P(RestockFeeAmt), AmtNetCredit=P(AmtNetCredit), ReplUnitPriceConv=P(ReplUnitPriceConv), ReplAmtExtPrice=P(ReplAmtExtPrice), ExportValue=P(ExportValue)) CO

EventHandler.Name: UMDataChange
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLRmarepls.RmaReplUMSp( PARMS(VAR V(UMOld), VAR C(UMEdit), VAR C(ItemEdit), VAR C(CustNumEdit), RVAR C(QtyToReturnConvEdit), RVAR C(UnitCreditEditHidden), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC2
Variable.Value: OBJECT2( RS_QCInspSups( CA(RNCSDVIOG) FILTERPERM(RefNum=FP(RmaNum) AND Item=FP(Item) AND RefLine=FP(RmaLine)) ORDERBY(RcvrNum DESC) LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: lsm1_CoNumEdit
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(Cus0CurrCode), VAR P(RmahdrCustNum))

Variable.Name: lsm1_CoNumGridCol
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(Cus0CurrCode), VAR P(RmahdrCustNum))

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: bEnabled = bNewAndNotClosed Or (Not (((oCache.GetCurrentObjectProperty("Stat") = "C" Or oCache.GetCurrentObjectProperty("Stat") = "H") And _
ThisForm.Components("UMEdit").Enabled = bEnabled And Not bSerialTracked And Not bFilled
ThisForm.Components("ItemEdit").Enabled = bEnabled And Not bFilled And bCanChangeItem
ThisForm.Components("UMGridCol").Enabled = bEnabled And Not bSerialTracked And Not bFilled
ThisForm.Components("ItemGridCol").Enabled = bEnabled And Not bFilled And bCanChangeItem
If bEnabled = False Or bFilled Then
' *** Evaluate if prompting for Tax System 1
' If tax code 1 is not set to prompt, disable the fields
' *** Set Tax Code 2 Labels if tax system 2 exists
' *** Hide Tax Code 2 fields if no tax system 2
' *** Disable Tax Code 2 fields if not prompting for tax system 2
' *** Disable NOTC fields if not using EC Reportgin
If Not ThisForm.Components("UnitCreditEdit").InputMask.Equals(strCstPrcMask) And Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(strCstPrcMask) Then
If Not ThisForm.Components("ExtendedPriceEdit").InputMask.Equals(strAmountMask) And Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(strAmountMask) Then
' if rma.stat is C or H or
' if not available rmarepl - Done by Item <> ""
'If Validation succeeds, then run the Data changed event handler
'May need to do a data changed event also or just fire appropriate events
'Set appropriate properties for Save time action.
'If Validation succeeds, then run the Data changed event handler
'May need to do a data changed event also or just fire appropriate events
'Set appropriate properties for Save time action.
loadResponse = IDOClient.LoadCollection("SLRmas", New PropertyList("CustSeq, ShipCode"), objFilter, String.Empty, -1)
''Check if user has RMA Hide Cost
'Do not pop up message if item and shipsite are not changed.
If (RestockFeeAmt <= System.Math.Round(UnitCreditConv * QtyToReturnConv, iDecimalPlaces)) Or (RestockFeeAmt = 0) Then
